I need to analyze the code to identify which files/classes belong to a `plugins` package, then count internal relations.

Looking through all the code provided, I can see files belonging to these packages/modules:
- `mermaid` (validator, generator, renderer, etc.)
- `parsers` (TypeScriptParser, ClassExtractor, etc.)
- `core` (MetricsCalculator, ArchJSONAggregator, etc.)

There is no `plugins` package represented in any of the code above. No file paths, imports, or class names reference a `plugins` package.
